message:
🐛 Fix klaude version ordering in shared.json

Reorder klaude versions to be in descending order (newest first):
0.7.1 -> 0.6.0 -> 0.5.0 -> 0.4.x

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -164,6 +164,16 @@
         "isDefault": false,
         "isDev": true
       },
+      "0.7.1": {
+        "label": "v0.7.1",
+        "branch": "docs/klaude/0.7.1",
+        "isDefault": false
+      },
+      "0.6.0": {
+        "label": "v0.6.0",
+        "branch": "docs/klaude/0.6.0",
+        "isDefault": false
+      },
       "0.5.0": {
         "label": "v0.5.0",
         "branch": "docs/klaude/0.5.0",
@@ -193,16 +203,6 @@
         "label": "v0.4.0",
         "branch": "docs/klaude/0.4.0",
         "isDefault": false
-      },
-      "0.6.0": {
-        "label": "v0.6.0",
-        "branch": "docs/klaude/0.6.0",
-        "isDefault": false
-      },
-      "0.7.1": {
-        "label": "v0.7.1",
-        "branch": "docs/klaude/0.7.1",
-        "isDefault": false
       }
     }
   },
